category_name: 新アトラクション・施設
summary: ディズニーは、アメリカ建国250周年を祝う新アトラクション「Soarin’ Across America」をEPCOTで5月26日に、ディズニー・カリフォルニア・アドベンチャーで2026年7月2日にオープンしました。ウォルト・ディズニー・イマジニアリングが制作したこのアトラクションは、アメリカ全土の新しい空撮映像と音楽で構成されています。

As a founding member of the X-Men, Scott Summers is no stranger to hardship and discipline. Having overcome discrimination and tribulation, he stands as an unyielding protector of Mutantkind.

Through his specialized ruby quartz visor, he's able to precisely control the devastating force channeled through his eyes, neutralizing any threat on the battlefield.

author: Xbox YouTube
summary: Xboxにて「Frog Sqwad 🐸」が発売開始。協力プレイや収集要素、ユニークなカエル成長システムなどが特徴の本作は、Xbox Series X|SおよびXbox Oneでプレイ可能。

Frog Sqwad 🐸 is launching on XBOX Series X|S and XBOX One.

Step into the Sewers and experience Frog Sqwad 🐸's world for the very first time on XBOX. Whether you're here for co-operative chaos, making sure the Swamp King is fed, or just the cool cosmetics, this launch trailer gives you a first look at what awaits.

Available now on XBOX: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/frog-sqwad/9N16RZ0S50V2

author: IGN YouTube
summary: Shiro Games開発のオープンワールドSF探索アドベンチャー「SpaceCraft」がPC(Steam)で早期アクセスを開始。広大な銀河を探索し、採掘、交易、宇宙での生活を築こう。
raw_text:
SpaceCraft - Official Early Access Launch Trailer
Take a look at the Early Access Launch Trailer for SpaceCraft, an open-world sci-fi exploration adventure game developed by Shiro Games. Players will explore a vast galaxy to mine, trade, and build a life amongst the stars. Explore planet to planet in SpaceCraft, available now in Early Access for PC (Steam).

author: 電ファミニコゲーマー RSS
summary: 『Forza Horizon 6』で一部ユーザーのセーブデータ消失問題が発生。公式サポートは原因調査中で、復旧手順と予防策としてXbox版のクイックレジューム無効化を推奨。データ消失時は新規作成せずサポートへ連絡するよう告知。
raw_text:
【注意】『Forza Horizon 6』一部ユーザーのセーブデータが消失する問題が発生。公式サポートチームが原因を調査中で、復旧手順や予防策を解説
消えた場合は新規データを作らず、当日中にサポートへ連絡するよう告知。予防策としてはXbox版での「クイックレジュームの無効化」を推奨

'Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari' Reveals Additional Staff, Second Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Jinushi's Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari (Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You) manga revealed addition staff and a second promotional video on Thursday. The first six episodes were streamed as 12 mini-episodes on Abema on June 3, and regular broadcasting is scheduled to begin on July 9 on TBS, followed by AT-X. 'Cyborg 009: Nemesis' Announces Additional Cast
The official website of the Cyborg 009: Nemesis anime series revealed additional cast and a new character visual (pictured right) on Friday. The anime adapting Shoutarou Ishinomori's action sci-fi manga will begin streaming in Summer 2026. Cast Pyunma/008: Yuu Hayashi (Tokyo Revengers) Great Britain/007: Kentarou Tone (Utawarerumono: Itsuwari no Kamen) Chang Changku/006: Mitsuaki Kanuka (Kusuriya no Hitorigoto) Geronimo Jr./005: Hiroki Yasumot
